creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
The maintainer was only changed 2 weeks ago after somebody volunteered
to maintain it. What is the point of changing the maintainer again so soon?

I am not sure what you mean with the port is not up to date?
We use [0] and 6.7 is the last release there. According to Repology this
is also the last release everywhere [1] and OpenBSD has not made any
changes to it since April 2020 either [2].

If you want to update the port you can submit a patch for maintainer
review and approval.

[0] https://github.com/leahneukirchen/cwm
[1] https://repology.org/project/cwm/versions
[2] https://github.com/openbsd/xenocara/tree/master/app/cwm
